programme.title: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: With an all-star cast that includes Sean Connery, Anthony Hopkins, Laurence Olivier, Gene Hackman and Robert Redford, this epic WW II drama recreates Operation Market Garden, an ambitious plan to hasten the end of WW II that ended in disaster.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars as an imprisoned officer who refuses to give up his fight against the Nazis, even from behind enemy lines. With the help of a young lieutenant (Colin Farrell), he risks everything to free his men and change the outcome of the war!

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an "inescapable" Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Inspired by Oliver Stone's own experiences, this anti-war epic tells the tale of PFC Chris Taylor (Charlie Sheen), an Army recruit sent to Vietnam, who witnesses the atrocities of war – many of which are carried out by his comrades.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: John Woo directs this epic, action-packed drama about a WW II soldier (Nicolas Cage) assigned to protect a Navajo soldier (Adam Beach)...and the secret code he knows. Christian Slater, Roger Willie, Peter Stormare and Mark Ruffalo also star.

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Colonel Claus von Stauffenberg (Tom Cruise) and his assassination plot targeting Adolph Hitler, this engrossing thriller reenacts the daring operation to eliminate one of the most evil tyrants the world has ever known.

programme.title: Truck Turner
programme.desc: The great Isaac Hayes stars in this powerful, pull-out-the-stops crime thriller that pulsates with high-octane energy and nonstop suspense as Truck Turner tracks a sadistic pimp through the mean streets of Los Angeles. Nichelle Nichols also stars.

programme.title: Black Mama, White Mama
programme.desc: A tough prostitute (Pam Grier) and a revolutionary (Margaret Markov) are admitted to a tough women’s prison where almost immediately they clash.

programme.title: Coffy
programme.desc: Pam Grier stars as Nurse "Coffy" Coffin, a one-woman vigilante force, out to even the score with those who have hooked her sister on drugs. Using her feminine wiles and deadly weapons, Coffy sets about ridding the streets of society's scum.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: Pam Grier portrays one of the screen's first action heroines with humor, sensitivity and steely determination. This electrifying revenge thriller explodes with all the sex appeal and cooler-than-cool attitude of its irresistible leading lady.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Sophisticated, handsome Thomas Crown (Steve McQueen) is the intellect behind a bank robbery so stunning, it has Boston's finest completely baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek and smart insurance investigator out to bring him in.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1999)
programme.desc: In this sizzling action film, when thrill-seeking billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) ingeniously steals a priceless painting from a museum, he's pitted against the beautiful insurance investigator (Rene Russo) hired to retrieve the artwork.
